name: Chicken Potpie with Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, peas, and mushrooms in a 9 or 10-inch deep-dish pie plate. Stir to mix.
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper. Add vegetable shortening and mix until crumbly. Gradually add milk and stir with a fork until just blended.
3. Drop heaping tablespoonfuls of the biscuit mixture over the chicken mixture; sprinkle with paprika.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly. If using frozen biscuits, bake an additional 10-15 minutes.
Note: You can substitute Bisquick for the flour, baking powder, and shortening.
